question: Will the Iranian regime fall before 2027?
narrative_context: Khamenei assassinated Feb 28, 2026 during Operation Epic Fury
Mojtaba Khamenei (son) installed as supreme leader March 9 — regime consolidated, not collapsed
IRGC strengthened control during transition; clerical apparatus remains intact
No credible signs of mass uprising or institutional collapse as of April 1
Regime survived assassination with succession in place; system proves resilient
Dynastic succession (Mojtaba) signals stability of clerical-IRGC power structure
evidence: Washington Post, March 1, 2026: regime succession handled without institutional collapse
Al Jazeera, March 2026: IRGC consolidated real power during transition to Mojtaba
CFR analysis: Mojtaba succession creates appearance of clerical continuity despite underlying IRGC strengthening
Iran Int'l, March 2026: Mojtaba installed March 9; no mass defections or military breakup
RAND analysis: Mojtaba may be symbolic cover for IRGC consolidation, but system remains intact
counter_evidence: External military pressure from US/Israel could destabilize regime if sustained over months. Popular discontent exists in urban centers. IRGC factionalism could emerge. But none of these show signs of forcing regime collapse by Dec 31, 2026.
thesis: Market significantly overprices regime collapse at 33.5%. Historical fact check: regime survived assassination of leader and installed successor (Mojtaba) within days. System proves resilient. IRGC consolidated power rather than fracturing. Zero credible collapse indicators as of April 1. Regime-collapse would require: (1) mass popular uprising (not visible), (2) military defection (IRGC loyal), (3) foreign occupation (no occupation plan), or (4) implosion from internal factional war (IRGC unified). None present. Even if US/Israel maintains military pressure, regime likely survives through Dec 31 — it has for 8+ months under pressure already. Market confuses military vulnerability with political collapse. Real probability: 18% (accounts for tail risk of unexpected factional conflict or foreign intervention).
x_thread: Market says Iranian regime falls before Dec 31, 2026. 33.5% odds. But regime survived Khamenei's assassination 1 month ago. Mojtaba installed, system intact. 🧵
Regime test: can it survive killing of its leader? PASSED. Mojtaba installed March 9. IRGC consolidated power, not fractured. Succession = stability signal.
Regime collapse requires: mass uprising (not visible), military defection (IRGC loyal), foreign occupation (no plan), or internal war (unified). None happening.
Regime is militarily vulnerable but politically consolidated. Market overprices political collapse tail. Real odds: ~18%. https://dub.sh/pb-x
